title: MFMET A3.2.7 Documented example of surface roughness measurements
author: Pecnik, Christina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This report addresses the activity A3.2.7 defined in the JRP protocol as: 
 
 
 
 
  Activity number  
 
 
  Activity description  
 
 
  Partners  (Lead in bold)  
 
 
 
 
 A3.2.7 
 M20 
 
 
 LNE, IMTAG, IPQ, CEA and INESC MN will perform a documented example of the test protocol developed in A3.2.4. 
 LNE with support from IMTAG, IPQ, CEA and INESC MN will write a technical report on the documented example of the test protocol for surface roughness. The report will be shared with the relevant standardisation group such as ISO/TC48/WG3 and WG5, ISO/TC229, CEN/TC332/WG7. 
 This information will also be used for manufacturing the transfer standards in A2.4.2. 
 
 
  LNE , IMTAG, IPQ, CEA, INESC MN
